title: Dashie Pack
description: This is my first Texture pack, this is a perfect pack for Survival and SMP players (and for gays :3), btw this pack is soo cute!
body:
# **Haiiiiii!**

This is my first pack, this is a cute pack.
-  The pack is 16x16, and its made to Smp-s and Survival worlds
-  The best shaders to pack: Bliss and Solas
-  The pack main version is 1.21.11.!

## **Enjoy :3**
